notes.title: Work-Item Taxonomy (WHERE each item lives)
notes.summary: The docs/ subfolder + filename pattern + owning role for every document type — Project brief, Project config, Roadmap, PRD, TRD, Epic, User Story, Bug, Test Case, Session reports, Feature log.
notes.load_when: When you need to know WHERE a work item lives, what to name its file, or which role owns it.

notes.title: The Link Graph (relative-markdown links)
notes.summary: Every work-item relationship as a labelled, bidirectional relative-markdown link; Test Case is-tested-by User Story, Bug blocks its story, PRD↔TRD.
notes.load_when: When linking two work items, or checking which relationship semantic and direction to write.

notes.title: Status Lifecycle + the Bookend Rule (docs/-native)
notes.summary: The frontmatter status lifecycle, the bookend rule (transition forward before + after work), required frontmatter fields, and the passport signature.
notes.load_when: When starting or finishing work on a work item, setting its status, or filling required frontmatter fields.

notes.title: The Test Case Template (mandatory)
notes.summary: The mandatory field-by-field shape every docs/test_cases/ file must follow, plus its required is-tested-by link to the User Story.
notes.load_when: When authoring or reviewing a Test Case file in docs/test_cases/.

notes.title: The RCA Bug Report (the docs/bugs/ Bug format)
notes.summary: The canonical RCA-rich docs/bugs/ Bug format — metadata + Symptom/Reproduction + Fix(GitHub) + files-touched diff + 5-Whys RCA; the finder authors at detection, the dev completes the fix sections in the SAME file.
notes.load_when: When authoring or completing a docs/bugs/ Bug file — the detection-time write-up or a dev recording its fix.

notes.title: Team Work-Reporting / Session Work Folder (docs/sessions/) + Feature Log
notes.summary: The per-session work folder, the start/finish report bookend, build-brain organization, the report schema, role sections, and the per-feature work-log (docs/reports/feature-log/<slug>.md split files + the docs/reports/feature-log.md lean index).
notes.load_when: When bookending your run as a report, organizing a session folder or agent-memory, or filling the feature log.

notes.title: Conventions Recap (the non-negotiables) + Knowledge Strategy
notes.summary: The single checklist of docs/-native non-negotiables (incl. the docs/ vs .ai_log/ split), plus the knowledge-capture and update-permission strategy for this skill.
notes.load_when: When you want a one-glance checklist of the docs/-native rules, or the rules for updating this skill.
